if.test: TOTAL_COUNT == null and sort_column_name != null and sort_type != null

when.test: TOTAL_COUNT == null and page != null and limit != null
TOTAL_COUNT == null and page != null and limit == null

mapper.select:
SELECT U.NAME , U.EMAIL , U.AGENCY_NAME ,U.ID , U.PW , U.LVL , TO_CHAR(U.LAST_LOGIN, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS LAST_LOGIN , U.PHONE_NUMBER FROM nia.tb_user U
U.NAME LIKE '%' || #{NAME} || '%'
AND U.AGENCY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{AGENCY_NAME} || '%'
AND UPPER(U.NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{name}) || '%'
AND CAST(U.LVL AS VARCHAR) IN
#{LEVEL}
ORDER BY LAST_LOGIN DESC
ORDER BY NAME DESC

WITH series AS ( SELECT generate_series (
DATE_TRUNC(#{SERIES_TYPE}, TO_DATE(#{DATE}, #{SERIES_FORMAT})::date), DATE_TRUNC(#{SERIES_TYPE}, TO_DATE(#{DATE}, #{SERIES_FORMAT})::date) + ('1 ' || #{SERIES_TYPE})::INTERVAL - ('1 ' || #{STATISTICS_TYPE})::INTERVAL,
DATE_TRUNC(#{SERIES_TYPE}, CURRENT_DATE), DATE_TRUNC(#{SERIES_TYPE}, CURRENT_DATE) + ('1 ' || #{SERIES_TYPE})::INTERVAL - ('1 ' || #{STATISTICS_TYPE})::INTERVAL,
('1 '|| #{STATISTICS_TYPE})::INTERVAL ) AS series_time ) SELECT TO_CHAR(series.series_time, #{STATISTICS_FORMAT}) AS series_time,
COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN TPD.self_process_group IN ('SO') THEN 1 END), 0) AS SO_TOTALCOUNT, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN TPD.self_process_group IN ('SO') AND TPD.clos_type = 'A' AND TPD.clos_status = 'Y' THEN 1 END), 0) AS SO_COUNT, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN TPD.self_process_group IN ('ST') THEN 1 END), 0) AS ST_TOTALCOUNT, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN TPD.self_process_group IN ('ST') AND TPD.clos_type = 'A' AND TPD.clos_status = 'Y' THEN 1 END), 0) AS ST_COUNT FROM series LEFT JOIN nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl TPD ON DATE_TRUNC(#{STATISTICS_TYPE}, TPD.occur_time) = series.series_time GROUP BY series_time ORDER BY series_time

SELECT ALARMNO , TICKET_ID , CLUSTERNO , NUDE_NUM , NODE_NM , ALARMLOC , TICKET_TYPE , TO_CHAR(ALARMTIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ALARMTIME , FAULT_TIME , ALARMMSG , PORT , ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL , STATUS , TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE , TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT , ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ , ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA , ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ , ZERO1_ENTROPY , IP_ADDR FROM ( SELECT ACM.ALARMNO , TC.TICKET_ID , ACM.CLUSTERNO , NULL NUDE_NUM , ACM.SYSNAME AS NODE_NM , ACM.ALARMLOC , TC.TICKET_TYPE , ACM.ALARMTIME AS ALARMTIME , NULL FAULT_TIME , ACM.ALARMMSG , ACM.PORT , ACM.ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL , TC.STATUS , TC.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE , NULL TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ , TC.ZERO1_ENTROPY , NM.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDR FROM ( SELECT ACM.ALARMNO , MAX(ACM.CLUSTERNO) AS CLUSTERNO , ACM.SYSNAME , ACM.ALARMTIME AS ALARMTIME , ACM.CLEARTIME , ACM.ALARMLOC , ACM.ALARMMSG , ACM.ALARMLEVEL , ACM.PORT , ACM.ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL FROM rca.tb_alarm_cur_mst ACM WHERE ALARMNO LIKE 'I%' AND ALARMTIME > now() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY ACM.ALARMNO, ACM.SYSNAME, ACM.ALARMTIME, ACM.CLEARTIME, ACM.ALARMLOC, ACM.ALARMMSG, ACM.ALARMLEVEL, ACM.PORT, ACM.ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL ) ACM LEFT JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_current TC ON ACM.clusterno = TC.cluster_no LEFT JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON TC.TICKET_ID = AL.TICKET_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NM ON NM.NODE_ID = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA UNION ALL SELECT NULL ALARMNO , TC.TICKET_ID , CLUSTER_NO , NULL NODE_NUM , NULL NODE_NM , NULL ALARMLOC , TICKET_TYPE , TICKET_GENERATION_TIME AS ALARMTIME , FAULT_TIME , NULL ALARMMSG , NULL PORT , NULL ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL , STATUS , TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE , TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT , ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ , ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA , ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ , TC.ZERO1_ENTROPY , NM.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDR FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current TC INNER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON TC.TICKET_ID = AL.TICKET_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NM ON NM.NODE_ID = al.root_cause_sysnamea WHERE TICKET_TYPE IN ('NFTT', 'FTT', 'ATT2', 'NTT') AND TC.PARENT_TICKET_ID IS NULL AND TC.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME > now() - INTERVAL '7' DAY UNION ALL SELECT SAM.ALARMNO , NULL TICKET_ID , NULL CLUSTER_NO , SAM.NODE_NUM , SAM.NODE_NM , SAM.ALARMLOC , 'SYSLOG' TICKET_TYPE , SAM.ALARMTIME AS ALARMTIME , NULL FAULT_TIME , SAM.ALARMMSG , NULL PORT , SAM.ETC AS ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL , CASE WHEN SAM.STATUS IN ('INIT', 'FIN', 'AUTO_FIN') THEN SAM.STATUS ELSE '-' END AS STATUS , NULL TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE , NULL TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT , NULL ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , NULL ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ , NULL ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA , NULL ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ , NULL ZERO1_ENTROPY , NM.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDR FROM rca.tb_syslog_alarm_mst SAM LEFT JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NM ON NM.NODE_ID = SAM.NODE_NM WHERE ALARMTIME > now() - INTERVAL '48' HOUR
) T
WHERE T.ALARMTIME >= (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '5 minutes')
ORDER BY ALARMTIME DESC

SELECT ALARMNO , SYSNAME , EQUIPTYPE , TO_CHAR(ALARMTIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ALARMTIME , RECEIVETIME , ALARMLOC , ALARMMSG , UNIT , CLEARTIME , PTPNAME , SLOT , PORT , ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL , RT.TICKET_ID , RT.TICKET_TYPE , TO_CHAR(RT.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TICKET_GENERATION_TIME , TO_CHAR(RT.FAULT_TIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS FAULT_TIME , RT.ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE , RT.ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN , RT.TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT , RT.STATUS , RT.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE , RT.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE , TO_CHAR(RT.TICKET_UPDATE_TIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TICKET_UPDATE_TIME FROM rca.tb_alarm_cur_mst AC LEFT JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON AC.ALARMNO = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOA LEFT JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_current RT ON RT.TICKET_ID = AL.TICKET_ID WHERE ALARMNO LIKE 'T%'
AND ALARMTIME > NOW() - INTERVAL '14' day
AND ALARMTIME >= (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '5 minutes')
ORDER BY ALARMTIME DESC

SELECT AC.ALARMNO , AC.CLUSTERNO , AC.SYSNAME , AC.EQUIPTYPE , TO_CHAR(AC.ALARMTIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ALARMTIME , TO_CHAR(AC.RECEIVETIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RECEIVETIME , AC.ALARMLOC , AC.ALARMMSG , AC.UNIT , AC.ALARMLEVEL , AC.CLUSTERNO_ORIGINAL , TO_CHAR(AC.CLEARTIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CLEARTIME , AC.PTPNAME , AC.SLOT , AC.PORT , AC.ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL , AL.TICKET_ID AS AL_TICKET_ID FROM rca.tb_alarm_cur_mst AC LEFT JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON AC.ALARMNO = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOA WHERE CLUSTERNO IN ( SELECT CLUSTER_NO FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current WHERE TICKET_ID = #{TICKET_ID} ) AND ALARMTIME > NOW() - INTERVAL '1' YEAR
SELECT CODE , NAME , RESULT , TO_CHAR(UPDATE_TIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_TIME , DESCRIPTION FROM rca.tb_rca_monitoring

SELECT AL.TICKET_ID , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ , TPD.SELF_PROCESS_GROUP , TPD.SELF_PROCESS_TYPE FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL LEFT JOIN nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl TPD ON TPD.TICKET_ID = AL.TICKET_ID
AND AL.TICKET_ID = #{TICKET_ID}

SELECT SA.ALARMNO , TO_CHAR(SA.ALARMTIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ALARMTIME , SA.NODE_NUM , SA.NODE_NM , SA.ALARMMSG , SA.ALARMLVL , SA.ETC , SA.RULE_ID , SA.ALARMLOC , SA.STATUS , TPD.SELF_PROCESS_GROUP , TPD.SELF_PROCESS_TYPE FROM rca.tb_syslog_alarm_mst SA LEFT JOIN nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl TPD ON TPD.ALARMNO = SA.ALARMNO
AND SA.ALARMNO = #{ALARMNO}

SELECT N.ID AS SDN_NODE_ID , NM.NODE_NUM AS STRRESID , NM.NODE_NM AS STRRESNM , I.ID AS SDN_IF_ID , I.IF_NAME AS STRIFNM , PM.IF_NUM AS STRIFID , LT.TX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPS_OUT , LT.RX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPS_IN , LT.TX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPS_OUT , LT.RX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPS_IN , UO.NREN_ID , UO.NREN_NAME , TO_CHAR(LT.MEASURED_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS MEASURED_DATETIME , LT.ID FROM IP_SDN.TB_LINK_TRAFFIC LT INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_INTERFACE I ON LT.IF_ID = I.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.IF_ID = LOWER(I.IF_NAME) INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_NODE N ON I.NODE_ID = N.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST NM ON N.ID = NM.IP_SDN_ID::INT LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON UO.NODE_ID = NM.NODE_ID AND UO.IF_ID = PM.IF_ID WHERE PM.NODE_NUM = NM.NODE_NUM AND NM.NODE_NM = #{START_NODE} AND I.IF_NAME = #{START_PORT} AND LT.MEASURED_DATETIME BETWEEN #{FAULT_TIME}::TIMESTAMP - interval '10 min' AND #{FAULT_TIME}::TIMESTAMP + interval '10 min' ORDER BY LT.ID

SELECT FLTBPSIN AS IN_BPS , ROUND(FLTBPSIN_PREDICT::NUMERIC , 2) AS IN_PREDICT , ROUND(FLTBPSIN_THRESHOLD_UPPER::NUMERIC , 2) AS IN_THRESHOLD_UPPER , ROUND(FLTBPSIN_THRESHOLD_LOWER::NUMERIC , 2) AS IN_THRESHOLD_LOWER , FLTBPSIN_ANOMALY AS IN_ANOMALY , FLTBPSOUT AS OUT_BPS , ROUND(FLTBPSOUT_PREDICT::NUMERIC , 2) AS out_predict , ROUND(FLTBPSOUT_THRESHOLD_UPPER::NUMERIC, 2) AS OUT_THRESHOLD_UPPER , ROUND(FLTBPSOUT_THRESHOLD_LOWER::NUMERIC, 2) AS OUT_THRESHOLD_LOWER , FLTBPSOUT_ANOMALY AS OUT_ANOMALY FROM rca.tb_anomalous_ai_result AR INNER JOIN resource.tb_port_mst PM ON AR.STRRESID = PM.NODE_NUM AND AR.STRIFID = PM.IF_NUM WHERE PM.node_id= #{START_NODE} AND PM.if_id = #{START_PORT} AND MEASURED_DATETIME = #{FAULT_TIME}::TIMESTAMP
SELECT DISTINCT NODE_NM AS VALUE FROM rca.tb_syslog_alarm_mst
SELECT DISTINCT ALARMLOC AS VALUE FROM rca.tb_syslog_alarm_mst WHERE ALARMLOC IS NOT NULL

SELECT SOP.SOP_ID , SOP.TICKET_ID , SOP.TICKET_TYPE , CASE WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'ATT2' THEN '이상 트래픽' WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'NTT' THEN '유해 트래픽' WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'NFTT' THEN '장비 과부하 장애' WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'FTT' THEN '비장애' ELSE '장애' END AS TICKETTYPE, SOP.TICKET_RESULT , SOP.STATUS , TO_CHAR(SOP.REQUEST_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REQUEST_TIME, TO_CHAR(SOP.RECEIVE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RECEIVE_TIME, SOP.DETAIL , SOP.FAULT_CLASSIFY , SOP.FAULT_TYPE , SOP.FAULT_DETAIL_CONTENT , SOP.ETC_CONTENT , SOP.AI_ACCURACY , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ , NODEA.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDRA , NODEZ.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDRZ , TC.ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE AS ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE , TO_CHAR(TC.FAULT_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS FAULT_TIME , SOP.HANDLING_ACK_USER AS HANDLING_ACK_USER , TO_CHAR(SOP.HANDLING_ACK_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HANDLING_ACK_TIME , SOP.HANDLING_FIN_USER AS HANDLING_FIN_USER , TO_CHAR(SOP.HANDLING_FIN_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HANDLING_FIN_TIME FROM nia.tb_sop SOP LEFT JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON SOP.TICKET_ID = AL.TICKET_ID LEFT JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_current TC ON AL.TICKET_ID = TC.TICKET_ID LEFT JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NODEA ON NODEA.node_id = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA LEFT JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NODEZ ON NODEZ.node_id = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ WHERE 1=1
AND SOP.TICKET_ID LIKE '%' || #{TICKET_ID} || '%'
AND AL.INSERT_TIME >= #{START_DATE}::TIMESTAMP
AND AL.INSERT_TIME <= #{END_DATE}::TIMESTAMP
AND TC.TICKET_TYPE IN (#{TICKET_TYPE})
AND AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA = #{ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA} AND request_time > now() - INTERVAL '1' month
ORDER BY SOP.REQUEST_TIME DESC

SELECT TC.TICKET_ID , TC.PARENT_TICKET_ID , TC.FAULT_TIME , CASE WHEN TC.STATUS = 'AUTO_FIN' THEN TC.TICKET_UPDATE_TIME ELSE SOP.HANDLING_FIN_TIME END AS HANDLING_FIN_TIME , TC.TICKET_TYPE , TC.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE , TC.STATUS , TA.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , TA.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA , TA.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ , TA.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current TC INNER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current TA ON TC.TICKET_ID = TA.TICKET_ID LEFT JOIN NIA.TB_SOP SOP ON TC.TICKET_ID = SOP.TICKET_ID
AND TC.TICKET_ID = #{TICKET_ID}
AND TC.TICKET_TYPE = #{TICKET_TYPE}
AND TC.FAULT_TIME >= #{INIT_START_DATE}::TIMESTAMP AND TC.FAULT_TIME <= #{INIT_END_DATE}::TIMESTAMP
AND CASE WHEN TC.STATUS = 'AUTO_FIN' THEN TC.TICKET_UPDATE_TIME ELSE SOP.HANDLING_FIN_TIME END >= #{FIN_START_DATE}::TIMESTAMP AND CASE WHEN TC.STATUS = 'AUTO_FIN' THEN TC.TICKET_UPDATE_TIME ELSE SOP.HANDLING_FIN_TIME END <= #{FIN_END_DATE}::TIMESTAMP
AND TC.FAULT_TIME > RCA.FC_GET_MINUS_DAY(7)
ORDER BY TC.TICKET_ID DESC
SELECT node_nm FROM rca.tb_syslog_alarm_mst tsam WHERE tsam.alarmtime BETWEEN NOW()::TIMESTAMP - interval '30 day' AND NOW()::TIMESTAMP GROUP BY node_nm

SELECT syslog_rule_id , syslog_rule_nm , occur_str1 , occur_str2 , occur_str3 , occur_except_str1 , occur_except_str2 , occur_except_str3 , CASE WHEN tsrm.use_yn = 'Y' THEN '사용' ELSE '미사용' END AS use_yn FROM gather.tb_syslog_rule_mst tsrm
ORDER BY syslog_rule_id
mapper.update: UPDATE GATHER.TB_SYSLOG_RULE_MST SET SYSLOG_RULE_NM = #{syslog_rule_nm}, OCCUR_STR1 = #{occur_str1}, OCCUR_STR2 = #{occur_str2}, OCCUR_STR3 = #{occur_str3}, OCCUR_EXCEPT_STR1 = #{occur_except_str1}, OCCUR_EXCEPT_STR2 = #{occur_except_str2}, OCCUR_EXCEPT_STR3 = #{occur_except_str3}, USE_YN = CASE WHEN #{use_yn} = '사용' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END WHERE SYSLOG_RULE_ID = #{syslog_rule_id}
mapper.select: SELECT syslog_rule_nm, COUNT(*) FROM gather.tb_syslog_rule_mst WHERE syslog_rule_nm = #{syslog_rule_nm} GROUP BY syslog_rule_nm HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

SELECT FAULT_GB
, ARRAY_AGG(FAULT_TYPE) AS CODE_ARR
, SEQ , USER_ID , FAULT_TYPE , REG_TIME
FROM nia.tb_sop_code
GROUP BY FAULT_GB
AND USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{USER_ID} || '%'
AND FAULT_GB LIKE '%' || #{FAULT_GB} || '%'
AND FAULT_TYPE LIKE '%' || #{FAULT_TYPE} || '%'
AND REG_TIME > #{START_DATE}::TIMESTAMP
AND REG_TIME <= #{END_DATE}::TIMESTAMP
ORDER BY REG_TIME
SELECT NREN_NAME AS NAME, NREN_ID AS ID FROM RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN TCC ORDER BY NREN_NAME
SELECT port_num AS port_code , protocol AS protocol_name FROM gather.tb_default_port_number WHERE protocol IS NOT NULL ORDER BY protocol

SELECT COUNTRY_NAME, KOICA FROM GATHER.TB_COUNTRY_CODE
AND COUNTRY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{country_name} || '%'
AND KOICA LIKE '%' || #{country_code} || '%'

SELECT IP.NREN_ID AS NREN_ID, IP.NREN_NAME AS NREN_NAME, IP.NREN_IP AS NREN_IP FROM RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN_IP IP ON UO.NREN_ID = IP.NREN_ID
AND IP.NREN_NAME LIKE '%' || #{nren_name} || '%'
AND IP.NREN_IP LIKE '%' || #{nren_ip} || '%'
AND IP.NREN_ID IN (SELECT NREN_ID FROM RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN WHERE NODE_ID = #{node_id})

SELECT MAPP_SERIAL, PORT_NUM, IP_TYPE, PROTOCOL, DESCRIPTION FROM GATHER.TB_DEFAULT_PORT_NUMBER
AND PROTOCOL IS NOT NULL
AND PROTOCOL LIKE '%' || #{protocol} || '%'
AND PORT_NUM like '%' || #{port_num} || '%'
ORDER BY PROTOCOL ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO GATHER.TB_DEFAULT_PORT_NUMBER ( PROTOCOL, PORT_NUM,
DESCRIPTION ) values ( #{protocol}, #{port_num},
#{description} )
mapper.select:
SELECT A.NODE_NUM AS NODE_NUM, A.SDN_NODE_ID AS SDN_NODE_ID, A.NODE_NM AS NODE_NM, TRUNC(A.CPU_USAGE::NUMERIC,3) * 100 AS CPU_USAGE, TRUNC(A.MEM_USAGE::NUMERIC,3) * 100 AS MEM_USAGE, TO_CHAR(A.MEASURED_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS MEASURED_DATETIME, CASE WHEN TN.STRRESID IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS AI_RESULT FROM ( SELECT NM.NODE_NUM, N.ID AS SDN_NODE_ID, NM.NODE_NM, NF.CPU_USAGE, NF.MEM_USAGE, NF.MEASURED_DATETIME FROM IP_SDN.TB_NODEFACTOR NF INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_NODE N ON NF.NODE_ID = N.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST NM ON N.ID = NM.IP_SDN_ID::INT WHERE 1=1
AND NF.MEASURED_DATETIME BETWEEN NOW()::timestamp - interval '30 min' AND NOW()::timestamp
AND NM.NODE_NM LIKE '%' || #{node_nm} || '%'
AND NF.MEASURED_DATETIME::timestamp >= #{start_date}::timestamp
AND NF.MEASURED_DATETIME::timestamp <= #{end_date}::timestamp
AND NF.CPU_USAGE::VARCHAR LIKE #{cpu_usage} || '%'
AND NF.MEM_USAGE::VARCHAR LIKE #{mem_usage} || '%'
ORDER BY MEASURED_DATETIME DESC ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN RCA.TB_NODEFACTOR TN ON TN.STRRESID = A.NODE_NUM AND TN.MEASURED_DATETIME = A.MEASURED_DATETIME

SELECT PROFILE_NUM, PROFILE_TITLE, PROFILE_DESC, NETWORK_TYPE, PROCESSING_TEMPLATE, CONSTRUCTION_CHECK, AUTO_PROCESS_CHECK, TICKET_TYPE, PROCESS_TYPE, AUTO_RECOVERY, EMAIL_CHECK, TO_CHAR(AUTO_PROCESS_START_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') AS AUTO_PROCESS_START_DATETIME, TO_CHAR(AUTO_PROCESS_END_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') AS AUTO_PROCESS_END_DATETIME, CASE WHEN AUTO_PROCESS_CHECK = 'true' THEN '상시' ELSE CASE WHEN AUTO_PROCESS_START_DATETIME IS NOT NULL AND AUTO_PROCESS_END_DATETIME IS NOT NULL THEN AUTO_PROCESS_START_DATETIME || ' ~ ' || AUTO_PROCESS_END_DATETIME ELSE NULL END END AS AUTO_PROCESS_INFO, TO_CHAR(CHNG_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DATETIME, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY PROFILE_NUM) AS ROWNUM FROM RESOURCE.TB_FAULT_PROCESS_PROFILE WHERE 1=1
AND PROFILE_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{profile_title} || '%'
AND UPPER(NETWORK_TYPE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{network_type}) || '%'
AND PROCESSING_TEMPLATE LIKE '%' || #{processing_template} || '%'
ORDER BY PROFILE_NUM
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO RESOURCE.TB_FAULT_PROCESS_PROFILE ( PROFILE_NUM, PROFILE_TITLE, PROFILE_DESC, NETWORK_TYPE, PROCESSING_TEMPLATE, AUTO_PROCESS_CHECK,
AUTO_PROCESS_START_DATETIME,
AUTO_PROCESS_END_DATETIME,
TICKET_TYPE, PROCESS_TYPE, CHNG_DATETIME, REG_DATETIME, AUTO_RECOVERY, EMAIL_CHECK ) values ( resource.uf_self_healing_profile_num(''), #{profile_title}, #{profile_desc}, #{network_type}, #{processing_template}, #{auto_process_check},
#{auto_process_start_datetime}::timestamp,
#{auto_process_end_datetime}::timestamp,
#{ticket_type}, #{process_type}, now(), now(), #{auto_recovery}, #{email_check} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE RESOURCE.TB_FAULT_PROCESS_PROFILE SET PROFILE_TITLE = #{profile_title}, PROFILE_DESC = #{profile_desc}, NETWORK_TYPE = #{network_type}, PROCESSING_TEMPLATE = #{processing_template}, AUTO_PROCESS_CHECK = #{auto_process_check},
AUTO_PROCESS_START_DATETIME = #{auto_process_start_datetime} ::timestamp,
AUTO_PROCESS_END_DATETIME = #{auto_process_end_datetime}::timestamp,
CHNG_DATETIME = NOW(), AUTO_RECOVERY = #{auto_recovery}, EMAIL_CHECK = #{email_check}, TICKET_TYPE = #{ticket_type}, PROCESS_TYPE = #{process_type} WHERE PROFILE_NUM = #{profile_num}
mapper.select:
SELECT TICKET_TYPE, MIN(TICKET_GB) AS TICKET_GB FROM RCA.TB_RCA_TICKET_TYPE_LIST WHERE 1=1
AND TICKET_GB != 'SWITCH'
AND TICKET_GB = 'SWITCH'
GROUP BY TICKET_TYPE
SELECT FAIL_TYPE, TICKET_TYPE FROM RCA.TB_RCA_TICKET_TYPE_LIST WHERE TICKET_TYPE = #{ticket_type}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT node_nm AS ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , 'IP' AS TYPE FROM resource.tb_node_mst UNION SELECT sysname AS ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , '전송' AS TYPE FROM nia.tb_equip_mst WHERE model != 'Utrans-6300p-H3' ) AS node ORDER BY ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA ASC

SELECT
PROFILE_NUM, NODE_ID, SERIAL_NUM FROM RESOURCE.TB_FAULT_PROCESS_IF WHERE PROFILE_NUM = #{profile_num}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RESOURCE.TB_FAULT_PROCESS_IF ( SERIAL_NUM, PROFILE_NUM, NODE_ID, CHNG_DATETIME, REG_DATETIME ) VALUES ( NEXTVAL('RESOURCE.SEQ_TB_FAULT_PROCESS_IF'), #{profile_num}, #{node_id}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NODE_NUM) AS ROWNUM, node.* FROM ( SELECT TNM.NODE_NUM, TNM.NODE_ID, TNM.NODE_NM, TNM.MODEL_NUM, TNM.MODEL_ID, CODE.CODE_NM, TNM.IP_ADDR, TNM.MAC_ADDR, TNM.ADMIN_YN, CASE WHEN ADMIN_YN = 'W' THEN '사용' ELSE '미사용' END AS ADMIN_YN_INFO, TNM.PRIMARY_GB, TNM.SNMP_VER, TNM.SNMP_COMMUNITY, TNM.SNMP_PORT, TNM.LATITUDE, TNM.LONGITUDE, TNM.NETCONF_PORT, TNM.NETCONF_ID, TNM.NETCONF_PW, TNM.NETCONF_TYPE, TNM.NODE_DIVISION, TNM.VENDOR, TNM.SFLOW_IP, TO_CHAR(TNM.CHNG_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DATETIME FROM RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST TNM LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_CODE CODE ON (TNM.MODEL_ID = CODE.CODE_ID) WHERE 1=1
AND tnm.NODE_NM like '%' || #{node_nm} || '%'
AND code.CODE_NM like '%' || #{model_id} || '%'
AND tnm.IP_ADDR like '%' || #{ip_addr} || '%'
AND tnm.ADMIN_YN like '%' || #{admin_yn} || '%'
AND tnm.CHNG_DATETIME BETWEEN #{start_date} ::timestamp and #{end_date}::timestamp
ORDER BY CHNG_DATETIME ASC ) AS node ORDER BY NODE_NUM

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS ROWNUM, * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TPM.NODE_NUM, TPM.NODE_ID, TPM.IF_NUM, TPM.IF_ID, TPM.IF_NM, TPM.IF_INDEX, TPM.IF_TYPE, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE((REVERSE((REGEXP_MATCH(REVERSE(TPM.IF_NM), E'G[0-9]+'))[1])), 'G', ''), CAST(CAST(TPM.IF_SPEED AS BIGINT) / 1000000000 AS BIGINT)::CHAR) AS IF_SPEED, TPM.IP_ADDR, TPM.MAC_ADDR, TPM.IF_OPER_STATUS, CASE WHEN IF_OPER_STATUS = 'up' THEN '사용' ELSE '미사용' END AS IF_OPER_STATUS_INFO, COALESCE(TPM.IP_PREFIX, ''), TPM.IF_DIVISTION, TO_CHAR(TPM.CHNG_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DATETIME FROM RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST TPM WHERE NODE_ID = #{node_id} ORDER BY IF_OPER_STATUS DESC, CHNG_DATETIME DESC ) AS port
mapper.update: UPDATE RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST SET IF_TYPE = #{if_type}, IF_SPEED = #{if_speed}, IP_ADDR = #{ip_addr}, IF_OPER_STATUS = #{if_oper_status}, DATA_SOURCE = 'web', CHNG_DATETIME = NOW() WHERE NODE_NUM = #{node_num} AND NODE_ID = #{node_id} AND IF_NM = #{if_nm}
mapper.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS ROWNUM , * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT BL.SRC_NODE_NUM , BL.SRC_NODE_ID , BL.SRC_IF_NUM , BL.SRC_IF_ID , SP.IF_NM AS SRC_IF_NAME , BL.SRC_IP_ADDR , BL.SRC_MAC_ADDR , BL.DEST_NODE_NUM , BL.DEST_NODE_ID , BL.DEST_IF_NUM , BL.DEST_IF_ID , DP.IF_NM AS DEST_IF_NAME , BL.DEST_IP_ADDR , BL.DEST_MAC_ADDR , BL.PREFIX , BL.BANDWIDTH , BL.CIRCUIT_NUM , BL.LINK_TYPE , BL.VLAN "VLAN" , BL.TAG "TAG" , BL.LINK_DESC , TO_CHAR(BL.CHNG_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DATETIME FROM RESOURCE.TB_BACKBONE_LINK BL LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST SP ON SP.NODE_ID = BL.SRC_NODE_ID AND SP.IF_ID = BL.SRC_IF_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST DP ON DP.NODE_ID = BL.DEST_NODE_ID AND DP.IF_ID = BL.DEST_IF_ID WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(BL.SRC_NODE_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{src_node_id}) || '%'
AND UPPER(BL.DEST_NODE_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{dest_node_id}) || '%'
AND UPPER(SP.IF_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{src_if_name}) || '%'
AND UPPER(DP.IF_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{dest_if_name}) || '%'
AND UPPER(BL.LINK_DESC) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{link_desc}) || '%'
) AS link
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RESOURCE.TB_BACKBONE_LINK ( SRC_NODE_NUM, SRC_NODE_ID, SRC_IF_NUM, SRC_IF_ID, DEST_NODE_NUM, DEST_NODE_ID, DEST_IF_NUM, DEST_IF_ID, SRC_IP_ADDR, DEST_IP_ADDR, BANDWIDTH, LINK_DESC, VLAN, TAG, REG_DATETIME, DATA_SOURCE ) values ( (SELECT RESOURCE.UF_GENERATOR_NUM('')), #{src_node_id}, (SELECT RESOURCE.UF_GENERATOR_NUM('')), #{src_if_id}, (SELECT RESOURCE.UF_GENERATOR_NUM('')), #{dest_node_id}, (SELECT RESOURCE.UF_GENERATOR_NUM('')), #{dest_if_id}, #{src_ip_addr}, #{dest_ip_addr}, #{bandwidth}, #{link_desc}, #{vlan}, #{tag}, NOW(), 'web' )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT PM.NODE_ID FROM RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RESOURCE.TB_BACKBONE_LINK BL WHERE BL.SRC_NODE_ID = PM.NODE_ID AND BL.SRC_IF_ID = PM.IF_ID OR BL.DEST_NODE_ID = PM.NODE_ID AND BL.DEST_IF_ID = PM.IF_ID ) ORDER BY NODE_ID

SELECT DISTINCT PM.NODE_ID--, PM.INT_NAME FROM RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RESOURCE.TB_BACKBONE_LINK BL WHERE BL.SRC_NODE_ID = PM.NODE_ID AND BL.SRC_IF_ID = PM.IF_ID OR BL.DEST_NODE_ID = PM.NODE_ID AND BL.DEST_IF_ID = PM.IF_ID ) AND PM.NODE_ID != #{node_id} ORDER BY NODE_ID

SELECT DISTINCT PM.NODE_ID, PM.IF_ID , IP_ADDR , IF_SPEED FROM RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RESOURCE.TB_BACKBONE_LINK BL WHERE BL.SRC_NODE_ID = PM.NODE_ID AND BL.SRC_IF_ID = PM.IF_ID OR BL.DEST_NODE_ID = PM.NODE_ID AND BL.DEST_IF_ID = PM.IF_ID ) AND PM.NODE_ID = #{node_id} AND IF_OPER_STATUS = 'up' ORDER BY IF_ID

SELECT TUO.NREN_ID, TUO.NREN_NAME, TUO.NODE_ID, TUO.IF_ID, IF.IF_NM, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE((REVERSE((REGEXP_MATCH(REVERSE(IF.IF_NM), E'G[0-9]+'))[1])), 'G', ''), CAST(CAST(TUO.BANDWIDTH AS BIGINT) / 1000000000 AS BIGINT)::CHAR) AS BANDWIDTH, TUO.CUSTOMER_ID, TUO.EMAIL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NREN_ID) AS ROWNUM FROM RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN TUO LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT NODE_ID, IF_ID, IF_NM FROM RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST) IF ON IF.NODE_ID = TUO.NODE_ID AND IF.IF_ID = TUO.IF_ID WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(TUO.NREN_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{nren_name}) || '%'
AND UPPER(TUO.NODE_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{node_id}) || '%'
AND UPPER(TUO.CUSTOMER_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{customer_id}) || '%'
ORDER BY NREN_ID
-- select distinct node_id from resource.tb_user_organ tuo SELECT distinct node_nm AS node_id , 'IP' AS TYPE FROM resource.tb_node_mst ORDER BY node_nm ASC
SELECT DISTINCT IF_ID, IF_SPEED FROM RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST WHERE NODE_ID = #{node_name} AND IF_OPER_STATUS = 'up' ORDER BY IF_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN_IP ( NREN_ID, NREN_NAME, NREN_IP ) VALUES ( #{nren_id}, #{nren_name}, #{nren_ip} )
